differential_diagnoses: Ischemic cardiomyopathy due to coronary embolus
next_steps: Holter monitoring for assessment of arrhythmia burden
Continued guideline-directed medical therapy for heart failure

differential_diagnoses: Arrhythmogenic right ventricular cardiomyopathy with left ventricular involvement
next_steps: Serologic testing for Trypanosoma cruzi antibodies
Review of ECG for right bundle branch block and left anterior fascicular block
Implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) implantation for primary prevention
Screening for extracardiac Chagas manifestations including esophageal manometry or barium swallow and abdominal imaging
